title: getComponentName()
text: getComponentName() Returns the component name of this component instance, or the main component instance. InstanceObject . getComponentName() Arguments None Return Value Returns the component name of the component instance. Exceptions The following exceptions may be thrown: uniface.InvalidDataObjectException Explain this code var vInstance = uniface.getInstance("MUSICLIST"); if (vInstance != null) { showComponentName(vInstance.getComponentName()); } Copy Related Links uniface The uniface object enables you to obtain information about DSP instances. uniface.Instance The uniface.Instance object provides access to selected properties and methods of the component instance that it represents.
